Biosecurity.requirement: Strict registration and mandatory risk assessment for AI models integrated with biological sequence design tools.
Biosecurity.penalty: Administrative fine up to 500,000,000 VND and immediate suspension of model deployment.

Biosecurity.requirement: High-risk classification requiring independent third-party safety audits for dual-use biotechnology AI applications.
Biosecurity.penalty: Administrative fines up to 35,000,000 EUR or 7% of global annual turnover, whichever is higher.

Biosecurity.requirement: Mandatory biosecurity alignment check and threat reporting before publishing open-weight biological design models.
Biosecurity.penalty: Revocation of digital commercial authorization and administrative sanctions.

AI Safety.requirement: Mandatory human-in-the-loop supervisor override mechanism for all generative foundation models deployed in public services.
AI Safety.penalty: Fines up to 200,000,000 VND and mandatory public model recall.

AI Safety.requirement: Mandatory verification of model robustness against jailbreak prompts, sycophancy bias, and translation hallucinations.
AI Safety.penalty: Voluntary framework - loss of compliance certification, standard listing, and reputational damage.

AI Safety.requirement: Implement localized risk monitoring, alignment checks, and translation guardrails to prevent harmful model behaviors in regional languages.
AI Safety.penalty: Voluntary guidance - no direct legal penalties, serves as regional industry best practice.

AI Safety.requirement: Transparency obligation: ensure users know they are interacting with AI, and disclose safety benchmark performance metrics.
AI Safety.penalty: Administrative fines up to 15,000,000 EUR or 3% of global annual turnover.

Data Privacy.requirement: Obtain explicit consent before utilizing personal data to train large language models or processing individual user interactions.
Data Privacy.penalty: Administrative fine up to 250 Crore INR (2.5 billion INR).

Data Privacy.requirement: Implement data protection frameworks and masking to prevent personal data from being stored or exposed in generative AI prompt logs.
Data Privacy.penalty: Financial penalty up to 1,000,000 SGD or 10% of local annual turnover, whichever is higher.

Data Privacy.requirement: Process personal data lawfully for automated decision making; provide individuals with the right to request human override review.
Data Privacy.penalty: Administrative fine up to 2% of annual revenues and potential criminal penalties up to 6 years imprisonment.

Default.requirement: Establish a risk management system to identify, evaluate, and mitigate safety risks throughout the AI system lifecycle.
Default.penalty: Administrative fines up to 30,000,000 EUR or 6% of global annual turnover.
